QWindowKit licence provenance
=============================

Component: QWindowKit
Version: 1.5.0
Upstream repository: https://github.com/stdware/qwindowkit
Licence source: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/stdware/qwindowkit/1.5.0/LICENSE
Licence: Apache License 2.0

The adjacent LICENSE file is an unmodified copy of the upstream LICENSE from
the QWindowKit 1.5.0 tag. Its SHA-256 digest, calculated from the upstream UTF-8
content, is:
